name: motion
title: Motion runtime
description: Tier-1 motion system (docs/plans/motion-system.md): zero-dependency WAAPI runtime. Full preset set -- fade family (5), slide family (4), scale-in/out, rotate, blur-in, color, bg -- plus motionStagger() for sibling stagger, three triggers (load/in-view/hover), FOUC pre-hide CSS, and prefers-reduced-motion handling. Bootstrap the pre-hide style + initMotion() once per page -- see the file header for usage.
